title: Chapter 193
content:
Chapter 192

Her dominant voice stayed steady as she moaned, even as her hips gave the smallest, involuntary rock against my hand.

“I am… en-enjoying this… Jack…”

Her thick thighs trembled around my wrist, and her massive ass clenched and shifted on the seat with every skillful curl of my fingers inside of her.

Though most of it was absorbed by her skirt, staining the front considerably.

Her massive thighs shook violently, and her flushed, sultry face went slack with pleasure for several long seconds before she managed to school her expression again, though the rapid rise and fall of her chest and the faint sheen of sweat on her skin gave away completely.

A smaller, but no less messy gush of her juices followed, soaking the fabric of her elegant gown between her thighs and leaving a visible wet patch on the velvet seat beneath her.

Then, Elara finally spoke, her voice slightly huskier than usual but still carrying that edge of command.

“Our dresses… they are ruined…”

That’s all she had to say, huh?

Valeria glanced down at her skirt, at the dark, wet stains spreading across the front of her skirt, and her face did something I couldn’t quite put my finger on.

It was a mix of embarrassment and something else. Something… humiliating.

I wonder if…?

It wasn’t the time to test this theory out, but I left it in my mind for now, locking it away for later, and focused on the current situation.

One of her hands even came to rest lightly on the back of my head, not pushing me away, but not quite guiding me either.

I pulled back slightly, my chin glistening, and looked up at Elara with respectful deference.

“My lady… the stains on your dresses… My mouth alone is not enough to clean the fabric. If you will permit it, I can use magic to remove them completely, but I fear my lowly magic would stain your dignity.”

Elara’s eyes narrowed slightly, not at the mention of my subservience, but at the mention of that magic. Interest flickered across her calculating features, sharp, assessing, and undeniably intrigued.

But she said nothing for a long moment, simply studying me. The silence stretched, filled only by the rocking of the carriage and the soft, unsteady breaths of the two women.

Finally, she gave a single, slow nod.

“Do it.”

I raised my head with a smile and also my hand, without saying anything in return except for the spell name.

“Cleanse.”

Instead of using it through the system, which would have cost less mana and had no dramatic effect, I cast the spell via a circle, creating a faint, pale blue shimmer of mana that washed over both women and their dresses, but only from the neck down, in case they had any makeup on, and it would cleanse along with it.

The wet stains vanished instantly, the fabric returning to its pristine state as though nothing had happened.

Even the scent of their juices in the air seemed to lighten, though it did not disappear entirely.

Elara watched the magic with sharp, unblinking interest, her expression unreadable. She said nothing about it.

But the way her eyes lingered on me afterward made it clear the moment had not gone unnoticed.

Valeria had returned to her stoic look, simply adjusting her skirt with quiet dignity, though the sultry heat in her eyes had not yet fully faded.

Elara, on the other hand, remained just like that, her pussy still exposed without caring enough to cover herself up.

And I…

I remained kneeling in front of them, waiting with eager anticipation for either one of them to bring it up. That would be wonderful in its own way.

“Get up, Jack. It is time we tend to you now.”

And the magic words I had been waiting for didn’t take too long to come.
